<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-317" location="lines:317-322" -->
```bash
  RESPONDER_PARTY=$(grpcurl -plaintext -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEDGER_TOKEN" localhost:2901 \
    com.daml.ledger.api.v2.admin.PartyManagementService/ListKnownParties | \
    jq -r '.party_details[] | select(.party | startswith("app_user")) | .party' | head -1)

  echo "Responder party: $RESPONDER_PARTY"

```
